subcodes.first_line: O thou glorious personage! His holiness Abul-Fazael--may my life be a sacrifice to him--during the days of his life did not rest one moment
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الرجل الجلیل حضرت ابی الفضائل روحی له الفداء در ایام حیات دمی آرام نگرفت
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
